steps.title: Use slope intercept form
steps.content:
A line with slope $-7$ can be written as
$$y=-7x+b$$where $b$ is the $y$-intercept.

steps.title: Read the intercept
steps.content:
The line passes through $(0,54)$. A point with $x=0$ is on the $y$-axis, so the $y$-intercept is $54$. Thus the equation is
$$y=-7x+54$$The answer is A.
